name: saier-monorepo
description: Elegant online painting runtime powered by PixiJS

scripts.build:electron: pnpm build:site && pnpm -C apps/electron run check
scripts.build:mobile: pnpm generate:site && pnpm -C apps/mobile run prepare:web && pnpm -C apps/mobile run check
scripts.check:cloudbase: node --check cloudbase/functions/saier-room-api/room-core.cjs && node --check cloudbase/functions/saier-room-api/activity-core.cjs && node --check cloudbase/functions/saier-room-api/activity-command-service.cjs && node --check cloudbase/functions/saier-room-api/activity-workers.cjs && node --check cloudbase/functions/saier-room-api/cloudbase-runtime.cjs && node --check cloudbase/functions/saier-room-api/handler.cjs && node --check cloudbase/functions/saier-room-api/index.js
scripts.build:lib: pnpm -C packages/collaboration run build && pnpm -C packages/saier run build
scripts.pack:check: CI=true pnpm --dir packages/core pack --dry-run && CI=true pnpm --dir packages/pixi pack --dry-run && CI=true pnpm --dir packages/saier pack --dry-run && CI=true pnpm --dir packages/vue pack --dry-run
